queries.question: What are descriptions of revenue streams all streaming services have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Revenue_Streams.description  from Streaming_Service_Revenue join Revenue_Streams on Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id = Revenue_Streams.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: For each streaming service, list the revenue streams they have and their descriptions.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , revenue_streams.name , revenue_streams.description from Streaming_Service_Revenue join Revenue_Streams on Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id = Revenue_Streams.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_revenue a :Streaming_Service_Revenue .
  ?revenue_streams a :Revenue_Streams .
  ?streaming_service_revenue p:hasRevenue_Streams ?revenue_streams .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_revenue p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?revenue_streams p:name ?name2 .
  ?revenue_streams p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Give me a description of revenue streams each streaming service uses.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , revenue_streams.description from Streaming_Service_Revenue join Revenue_Streams on Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id = Revenue_Streams.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_revenue a :Streaming_Service_Revenue .
  ?revenue_streams a :Revenue_Streams .
  ?streaming_service_revenue p:hasRevenue_Streams ?revenue_streams .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_revenue p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?revenue_streams p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me the revenue streams of every streaming service.
queries.sql: SELECT Revenue_Streams.name  from Streaming_Service_Revenue join Revenue_Streams on Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id = Revenue_Streams.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Show me the revenue streams of every streaming service.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , revenue_streams.name from Streaming_Service_Revenue join Revenue_Streams on Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id = Revenue_Streams.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_revenue a :Streaming_Service_Revenue .
  ?revenue_streams a :Revenue_Streams .
  ?streaming_service_revenue p:hasRevenue_Streams ?revenue_streams .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_revenue p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?revenue_streams p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: Show me revenue streams each streaming service has and their descriptions.
queries.sql: SELECT Revenue_Streams.name, Revenue_Streams.description  from Streaming_Service_Revenue join Revenue_Streams on Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id = Revenue_Streams.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Revenue.stream_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Revenue.service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me a description of revenue streams each streaming service uses.
Show me revenue streams each streaming service has and their descriptions.
Show me the revenue streams of every streaming service.
